hypothesis: A small non-DDR YPCB LED-map bitstream configures Board B and asserts FPGA DONE.

interpretation.reason: The same DONE=0 symptom occurs with a small non-DDR LED-map bitstream, so Board B is not currently usable for DDR3 cross-board comparison.

decision.next_gate: Make Board B assert DONE with a non-DDR bitstream or independently explain why openFPGALoader status reads all zero.
decision.blocked_experiments: Do not run v99/v106/v107 DDR comparison on Board B while the LED-map control reports DONE=0.
